question_text: Which of the following best describes friction?

options.label: A
options.text: A force that always speeds up moving objects

options.label: C
options.text: A contact force that opposes motion between surfaces

options.label: D
options.text: A force that only acts on smooth surfaces

explanation: Friction is a contact force (surfaces must touch) that always opposes motion. It acts in the opposite direction to movement and cannot increase the speed of a moving object.
